_what: THE tuning file. Every knob the engine exposes lives here. Edit a value, commit, and the next cycle runs it — no code changes, ever. Missing keys fall back to safe built-in defaults.

arena_grid._what: The authoritative strategy space the arena breeds over. Widen a list and new strategies compete on the next hourly cycle; champions are still elected only by forward survivability on REAL trades.

_note_on_size: 8 drops x 7 targets x 5 stops = 280 MR strategies competing hourly. Sub-percent (0.5%) steps need a naming-scheme upgrade first (names collide at int()); widen here when that ships.

live_output._what: the handoff switch: master|all_quadrants|crypto|stock|metal|energy. enabled stays false until YOU flip it; the engine emits LIVE_ORDERS_PREVIEW.json every cycle either way so the exact orders are visible long before real money.
